parameters.content:
## 🔧 BOM Version Reconciler

### What this workflow does
1. Receives old and new BOM file IDs via webhook
2. Downloads both BOM documents from Google Drive in parallel
3. Extracts component data from each version
4. Compares revisions and identifies all changes
5. Flags added, removed, and modified components
6. Logs differences to Google Sheets
7. Sends Slack alert with change summary

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   BOM ID | Old Revision | New Revision | Product | Components Added | Components Removed | Qty Changes | Spec Changes | Total Changes | Change Summary | Processed Date
3. Update YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID in the Log to Sheets node
4. Update YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID in the Send to Slack node
5. Connect Google Drive, Google Sheets, PDF Vector, and Slack credentials
6. Activate the workflow and copy the webhook URL

### How to trigger
POST to webhook URL:
{
  "oldBomFileId": "DRIVE_FILE_ID",
  "newBomFileId": "DRIVE_FILE_ID"
}

### Perfect for
- Production engineers
- Procurement managers
- Manufacturing planners

## 🔀 Parallel Processing
Old BOM and New BOM extract at the same time

parameters.prompt: Extract Bill of Materials information from this BOM document: BOM ID or part number, revision number, revision date, product name, product number, product description, prepared by, approved by, approval date, effectivity date, BOM type, total number of components, and a detailed summary of all components including item number, part number, description, quantity, unit of measure, material specification, and supplier for each component.

Extract Bill of Materials information from this BOM document: BOM ID or part number, revision number, revision date, product name, product number, product description, prepared by, approved by, approval date, effectivity date, BOM type, total number of components, and a detailed summary of all components including item number, part number, description, quantity, unit of measure, material specification, and supplier for each component.
